description_long: This is a vintage open-top car with a wooden slat bench seat and side panels, reminiscent of early 20th-century automobiles like the Ford Model T. The car features large spoked wheels, a prominent front grille, and round headlights mounted on either side of the hood. The body is primarily black with brass or bronze accents on the hood and headlight housings, while the seating and side panels are a light beige wood. The vehicle has a simple dashboard, a steering wheel, and visible engine components on the side. The rear of the car is open, with a slatted wooden backrest and no trunk or enclosed cargo area. The overall design is utilitarian and classic, suitable for historical or period urban settings.
description: A vintage open-top car with wooden bench seating, spoked wheels, and brass-accented headlights, evoking early 20th-century automotive design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the slatted wooden backrest, open seating area, and rear wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wooden side panels, spoked wheels, and exposed engine components.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the prominent grille, round headlights, and the open seating arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view with clear visibility of the wooden bench, side panels, and the car's mechanical details.
attribute_headlight_design: dual round headlights mounted on either side of the grille
